name: HTML V Editor

releases.author: mandolin
releases.description:
# HTML V Editor 1.2.1 Release Notes

## 中文

HTML V Editor 1.2.1 是一个兼容性补丁版本，修复 Windows 常见的 CRLF 换行对 `html-v` checklist 任务解析和回写的影响。

### 修复

- 修复 CRLF Markdown 中的 `html-v` fenced block 不能被 HTML V Tasks 识别，导致 block checklist 在任务面板中遗漏的问题。
- checklist 状态回写后会保留目标 `html-v` fence 原有的 LF 或 CRLF 换行格式，避免无关格式变化。

### 开发与验证

- 仓库加入受说明的 npm peer 解析兼容配置；开发者现在可使用 `npm ci` 在干净 clone 中按 lockfile 重复安装依赖。
- 完整发布 gate 已通过：28 个测试文件、108 项测试、发布包、市场质量、字体审计和生产依赖审计。
- CRLF 解析/回写已加入自动回归测试；HIA runtime JSDoc pilot 通过并生成 22 个 doclet。

### 兼容性

- 最低 Obsidian 版本：`1.12.0`。
- 仅支持桌面端。
- 标准发布资产：`main.js`、`manifest.json`、`styles.css`。

## English

HTML V Editor 1.2.1 is a compatibility patch for `html-v` checklist parsing and write-back on Windows-style CRLF Markdown.

### Fixes

- Fixes HTML V Tasks missing checklist items inside `html-v` fenced blocks when a Markdown file uses CRLF line endings.
- Preserves the target block's original LF or CRLF fence line endings when checklist state is written back.

### Development and verification

- Adds a documented npm peer-resolution compatibility setting so contributors can run reproducible `npm ci` installs from a clean clone.
- The full release gate passed: 28 test files, 108 tests, release-package checks, marketplace-quality checks, font audit, and production dependency audit.
- Adds automated CRLF parsing/write-back coverage; the HIA runtime JSDoc pilot passed with 22 rendered doclets.

### Compatibility

- Minimum Obsidian version: `1.12.0`.
- Desktop only.
- Standard release assets: `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`.
releases.name: HTML V Editor 1.2.1

releases.author: mandolin
releases.description:
# HTML V Editor 1.2.0 Release Notes

## 中文

HTML V Editor 1.2.0 新增 HTML 内部链接发现与受控导航能力，并收紧 Sandbox 脚本权限边界。

### 主要变化

- HTML V Tasks 侧栏新增 `Links` tab，可发现独立 HTML、Markdown `html-v` block 与 HTML embed 中的 `<a href>`。
- 支持 Obsidian wiki link 和 vault 相对 Markdown / HTML 路径；支持关键字、状态、当前文件和分页过滤。
- 已解析的内部链接只能由用户点击或命令触发打开；外部、危险、纯锚点和未解析地址只显示状态和原因。
- 新增 `Open HTML V links` 命令，以及 HTML 文件右键菜单中的 Links 入口。
- Trusted 与符合安全条件的 Sandbox 预览支持预览内链接点击和 hover，覆盖 HTML file、Reading、Live Preview、`html-v` block、embed 和 pop-out。

### 安全与修复

- Sandbox 开启脚本时不再隐式加入 `allow-same-origin`；旧危险设置会自动迁移为最小权限配置。
- 修复资源路径本地化误改写导航锚点的问题，vault 相对链接不再被误判为 `app:` 地址。
- 修复 iframe / pop-out 跨窗口 hover 和修饰键导航兼容性。
- Links 索引是插件自有的只读派生数据，不写入 Obsidian 核心 Backlinks、Graph、搜索索引或 `MetadataCache` 的链接数据。

### 兼容性

- 最低 Obsidian 版本：`1.12.0`。
- 仅支持桌面端。
- 标准发布资产：`main.js`、`manifest.json`、`styles.css`。

## English

HTML V Editor 1.2.0 adds discoverable, controlled navigation for HTML internal links and tightens Sandbox script isolation.

### Highlights

- Adds a `Links` tab to HTML V Tasks for `<a href>` entries from standalone HTML files, Markdown `html-v` blocks, and HTML embeds.
- Supports Obsidian wiki links and vault-relative Markdown / HTML paths, with search, status, current-file, and pagination filters.
- Only resolved internal links can be opened through an explicit user action or command. External, blocked, anchor-only, and unresolved URLs remain informational.
- Adds the `Open HTML V links` command and an HTML file context-menu entry.
- Supports preview click and hover for HTML files, Reading, Live Preview, `html-v` blocks, embeds, and pop-out windows in Trusted mode and eligible Sandbox configurations.

### Security and fixes

- Sandbox scripts no longer implicitly receive `allow-same-origin`; unsafe legacy combinations are migrated to the minimum permission set.
- Preserves navigation anchor URLs during resource localization, so vault-relative links are no longer rejected as `app:` URLs.
- Fixes cross-window iframe/pop-out compatibility for hover and modifier-key navigation.
- The Links index is plugin-owned and read-only. It does not write HTML links into Obsidian core Backlinks, Graph, search indexes, or `MetadataCache` link data.

### Compatibility

- Minimum Obsidian version: `1.12.0`.
- Desktop only.
- Standard release assets: `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`.
releases.name: HTML V Editor 1.2.0

releases.author: mandolin
releases.description:
# HTML V Editor 1.1.0 Release Notes

## 中文

HTML V Editor 1.1.0 为 HTML 内容导出带来 Markdown 和纯文本复制能力，并为后续互操作导入建立了可测试的转换基础。

### 主要变化

- HTML 文件 tab 新增 Markdown 与纯文本复制按钮。
- 新增命令面板命令：`Copy current HTML as Markdown` 与 `Copy current HTML as plain text`。
- Markdown `html-v` block 与嵌入 HTML 的 inline 工具栏新增 Markdown / 纯文本复制按钮。
- inline 编辑中的复制以当前工作副本为准，无需先保存；取消编辑不会把临时内容写回源文件。
- 新增 HTML 转 Markdown 核心、互操作样例语料、转换报告、资源本地化计划与 OneNote checkbox tag 映射基础。

### 验证与兼容性

- 已完成完整自动发布门禁，以及 Obsidian `1.12.7` 隔离 vault 的真实 UI smoke。
- 最低 Obsidian 版本保持 `1.12.0`。
- 仅支持桌面端。
- 标准发布资产为 `main.js`、`manifest.json`、`styles.css`。

## English

HTML V Editor 1.1.0 adds Markdown and plain-text export for HTML content, while establishing tested conversion foundations for future interoperability workflows.

### Highlights

- Adds Markdown and plain-text copy buttons to the HTML file tab.
- Adds the `Copy current HTML as Markdown` and `Copy current HTML as plain text` commands.
- Adds Markdown / plain-text copy buttons to inline toolbars for Markdown `html-v` blocks and embedded HTML.
- Exports the current inline working copy without requiring a save; cancelling editing does not write temporary content back to source files.
- Adds the HTML-to-Markdown conversion core, interoperability fixture corpus, conversion report model, resource-localization plan, and OneNote checkbox-tag mapping foundation.

### Verification and Compatibility

- Passed the complete automated release gate and real Obsidian `1.12.7` UI smoke in an isolated vault.
- Minimum Obsidian version remains `1.12.0`.
- Desktop only.
- Standard release assets are `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`.
releases.name: HTML V Editor 1.1.0

releases.author: mandolin
releases.description:
# HTML V Editor 1.0.7 Release Notes

## 中文

HTML V Editor 1.0.7 是一次字体合规和项目治理补丁版本，不改变现有 HTML 编辑、预览、嵌入和任务面板工作流。

### 主要变化

- HugeRTE 字体菜单改为 Inter、Noto、思源、Sarasa Gothic、JetBrains Mono、Fira Code、LXGW WenKai Mono 等开源字体优先选项。
- 编辑内容、隔离 iframe 和 HugeRTE 皮肤 CSS 统一使用开源字体优先栈与通用字体回退。
- 构建阶段清理 HugeRTE bundle 中未激活的专有字体默认值。
- 新增字体审计命令，阻止专有字体引用或字体文件重新进入标准发布资产。
- 内部规划与 AI 协作资料迁入独立私有 WorkZone，公开仓库文档边界更清晰。

### 兼容性

- 最低 Obsidian 版本保持 `1.12.0`。
- 仅支持桌面端。
- 标准发布资产仍为 `main.js`、`manifest.json`、`styles.css`。

## English

HTML V Editor 1.0.7 is a font-compliance and project-governance patch release. Existing HTML editing, preview, embed, and task-panel workflows remain unchanged.

### Highlights

- Replaces HugeRTE font choices with open-source-first families and generic fallbacks.
- Applies the open-source-first font policy to editor content, isolated frames, and HugeRTE skin CSS.
- Removes inactive proprietary font defaults from the bundled HugeRTE runtime during the release build.
- Adds an automated font audit that rejects blocked font references and bundled font files.
- Separates internal planning and AI collaboration materials into a private WorkZone repository.

### Compatibility

- Minimum Obsidian version remains `1.12.0`.
- Desktop only.
- Standard release assets remain `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`.
releases.name: HTML V Editor 1.0.7

releases.author: mandolin

## HTML V Editor 1.0.6

- Fixed modal html-v save flow so edited content persists correctly.
- Fixed modal Source mode layout and scrolling.
- Added Cut, Copy, Paste, Paste as plain text, and Select all toolbar actions in the visual editor.
- Includes recent html-v block size editing and no-op save stability fixes.

Standard Obsidian release assets are attached: main.js, manifest.json, styles.css.
releases.name: HTML V Editor 1.0.6

releases.author: mandolin
releases.description:
# HTML V Editor 1.0.0 Release Notes

## 中文

HTML V Editor 1.0.0 是面向 Obsidian 社区插件市场准备的首个正式版本。

### 主要功能

- 在 Obsidian 中预览、可视化编辑和保存 `.html` / `.htm` 文件。
- 支持 Markdown `html-v` code block 的阅读模式与 Live Preview 渲染和编辑。
- 支持 Markdown 中嵌入 HTML 文件，并从预览进入编辑。
- 内置 HugeRTE 可视化编辑器、Source 编辑模式和安全预览模式。
- 支持特殊字符选择器、HugeRTE checklist、表格内 checklist。
- 内置 HTML V Tasks 面板，支持 HTML checklist、`html-v` block checklist 和普通 Markdown task 的聚合、过滤、分页与回写。
- 支持 Safe / Sandbox / Trusted 三档预览安全配置。

### 发布方式

本版本已把 HugeRTE 运行资源打入标准发布资产中，社区插件安装只需要：

```text
main.js
manifest.json
styles.css
```

### 验证

```text
npm run release 通过
npm run size 通过
npm audit --omit=dev --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org 通过
versions.json 映射校验通过
```

## English

HTML V Editor 1.0.0 is the first marketplace-ready release for Obsidian Community Plugins.

### Highlights

- Preview, visually edit, and save `.html` / `.htm` files inside Obsidian.
- Render and edit Markdown `html-v` code blocks in Reading view and Live Preview.
- Render and edit embedded HTML files from Markdown.
- Bundle HugeRTE locally with source editing and configurable safe preview modes.
- Support character map insertion, HugeRTE checklist, and checklist items inside tables.
- Provide the HTML V Tasks side panel for HTML checklist, `html-v` checklist, and Markdown task aggregation.
- Support task filtering, pagination, and write-back.

### Release Assets

HugeRTE runtime resources are bundled into the standard plugin assets. The release only needs:

```text
main.js
manifest.json
styles.css
```
releases.name: HTML V Editor 1.0.0
